---
title: 'John 3 Increase Day'
date: '2013-04-10T03:31:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1708275570959679198'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/john-3-increase-day.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<h4 style="text-align: left;">COME:</h4><h4 style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=john+3%3A30&amp;t=kjv" target="_blank">John 3</a></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">30</span>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1565" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">He</a>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1163" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">must</a>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=837" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">increase</a>&nbsp;,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1161" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">but</a>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1691" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">I</a>&nbsp;must&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1642" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">decrease</a>&nbsp;.<br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1565" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">ejkei'non</a>&nbsp;<span class="key" style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px;">{D-ASM}</span>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1163" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">dei'</a>&nbsp;<span class="key" style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px;">{V-PQI-3S}</span>&nbsp;aujxavnein,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1691" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">ejme;</a>&nbsp;<span class="key" style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px;">{P-1AS}</span>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1161" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">de;</a>&nbsp;<span class="key" style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px;">{CONJ}</span>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1642" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">ejlattou'sqai.</a>&nbsp;<span class="key" style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px;">{V-PPN}</span></blockquote><br /><h4>HEAR:</h4>He must increase... I must decrease... This may be the most profound statement in this chapter. Sure, we could talk about many things:<br /><br /><ul><li>The interaction with the&nbsp;Religious&nbsp;scholar who didn't get it.&nbsp;</li><li>The Sacrifice of Jesus that was laid out so clearly from OT and NT</li><li>The most&nbsp;famous&nbsp;verse of all time "For God so loved the world that He gave..."</li></ul><div>For me, today, I hear one thing above all else. I must decrease and He must increase. I'm having trouble at work, I have been for years. I'm very successful there, to a point. I run up against the same problem in any department I go to. It has to do with policies that I feel are not in the best interest of the customer or the company. Then I realize... what is my REAL motive? If someone was telling me this about their company I would tell them "Of course! It's a secular company. Don't expect them to act they're not a secular company."&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>So what is the motive of my real frustration? It's how it all impacts me. I wouldn't be so bothered if it didn't affect me directly. After all the excuses are boiled down, all the reasons why this or that... it's just&nbsp;whining&nbsp; "Why are they doing this to ME?!"</div><div><br /></div><div>So when I upset about an incoming customer that I KNOW has been mishandled by another rep, I must ask this question now in the safety of my room so that I can recall it tomorrow, "Who is the victim here?" If I complain about it, than I make myself out to be the victim, instead of the customer. Then the customer get's to be the victim of my bad attitude because I have to deal with them when they "should have" been dealt with already by the other party.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>In other words, it's all about ME. What if I make it less about me? What if I decrease so that HE can increase? What if I let Jesus rule my calls through me? I can stop being so concerned about me and let Jesus be the one to speak through me to them. What if I be Jesus to these people, in any way I can or am allowed to.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><h4>DO:</h4><div>What if...</div><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>What if I decrease and let Him increase?</b></blockquote><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><object class="BLOGGER-youtube-video" classid="clsid:D27CDB6E-AE6D-11cf-96B8-444553540000" codebase="http://download.macromedia.com/pub/shockwave/cabs/flash/swflash.cab#version=6,0,40,0" data-thumbnail-src="http://img.youtube.com/vi/MNPoxmwLC1c/0.jpg" height="266" width="320"><param name="movie" value="http://youtube.googleapis.com/v/MNPoxmwLC1c&source=uds" /><param name="bgcolor" value="#FFFFFF" /><param name="allowFullScreen" value="true" /><embed width="320" height="266"  src="http://youtube.googleapis.com/v/MNPoxmwLC1c&source=uds" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" allowfullscreen="true"></embed></object></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><b>Have questions about anything I said here? Want to share your story? Comment Below!</b><br /><b><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b><br /><b><br /></b><b>N2 Good Success</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br />Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" style="background-color: white;" target="_blank">http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a><br />Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Empowered-To-Prosper/231019763613118" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/EmpoweredTooProsper</a><br />Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a><br />Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a><br />Other Blogs and Sites by the Wolfe Family:&nbsp;<a href="http://wfconceptions.wordpress.com/" target="_blank">http://wfconceptions.wordpress.com/&nbsp;</a><br />
